SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES SMITH--SF TAX COLLECTOR--INVESTIGATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
